productDisplayName: W Women Gathered Design Navy Blue Kurti
description: Composition Navy blue kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves, mandarin collar with a button closure, half buttoned placket, pin tucks below the placket that flare out at the waist and vented curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this classic piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
